allow: PowerShell($tools = 'magick','convert','gswin64c','gswin32c','inkscape','pdftoppm','pdftocairo','mutool','soffice'; foreach\($t in $tools\){ $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ "FOUND: $t -> $\($c.Source\)" } else { "missing: $t" } })

PowerShell($py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($py\){ "python: $\($py.Source\)"; python --version } else { "no python" }; $py3 = Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($py3\){ "py launcher: $\($py3.Source\)" })
PowerShell(python -c "import fitz, PIL; print\('fitz', fitz.__doc__.splitlines\(\)[0] if fitz.__doc__ else 'ok'\); print\('pillow ok'\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"\); $edge = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if\($edge\){ "EDGE: $edge" } else { "no edge"; Get-Command chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
